Container.Name: Screened
Container.Overview:
Screened is a self-hosted collaborative watchlist and movie night planner.
Track, rate, and review films and TV shows. Build shared watchlists with friends, run Movie Night Picker sessions to agree on what to watch, schedule Watch Parties, and sync your history from Plex and Letterboxd.
Requires an external PostgreSQL database. Install the official postgres template from Community Applications first, create a database and user, then paste the connection string into DATABASE_URL below.
Container.Requires: PostgreSQL 14+ container. Install the official "postgres" template from Community Applications, create a database named "screened" with a dedicated user, and paste the resulting connection string into the DATABASE_URL variable below.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Host port to access the Screened web UI.

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string for your Screened database. Example: postgresql://screened:password@192.168.1.100:5432/screened?schema=public

Config.Name: Auth Secret
Config.Description: Random secret used to sign sessions. Generate one at https://generate-secret.vercel.app/32 — must be at least 32 characters.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: Full URL where Screened is reachable (used for OAuth callbacks and Plex linking). Example: http://192.168.1.100:3000 or https://screened.yourdomain.com

Config.Name: Public App URL
Config.Description: Same value as App URL above — must match exactly.

Config.Name: TMDB API Key
Config.Description: The Movie Database read access token — required for movie/TV metadata and artwork. Get a free key at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

Config.Name: Allow Public Signup
Config.Description: Set to false to require invite links for all new accounts (except the very first user on an empty database).

Config.Name: Admin Emails
Config.Description: Comma-separated list of email addresses granted admin access (can generate invite links and manage the app). Example: you@example.com,partner@example.com

Config.Name: Sync Schedule
Config.Description: Cron expression for automatic Plex and Letterboxd sync. Default is every 6 hours. Example: 0 23 * * * = daily at 11 pm.

Config.Name: Streaming Country
Config.Description: Two-letter country code for streaming availability data (e.g. US, GB, CA, AU).

Config.Name: OMDb API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Adds Rotten Tomatoes and Metacritic scores to title pages. Get a free key at https://www.omdbapi.com

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Enables AI-powered discovery scoring in the Movie Night Picker.

Config.Name: Trakt Client ID
Config.Description: Optional. Trakt.tv integration. Register an app at https://trakt.tv/oauth/applications to obtain credentials.

Config.Name: Discord Application ID
Config.Description: Optional. Discord integration — application ID for slash commands and webhooks. See docs/discord-integration.md in the repo.

Config.Name: Discord Public Key
Config.Description: Optional. Discord integration — public key for verifying interaction requests.

Config.Name: Discord Bot Token
Config.Description: Optional. Discord bot token — required for sending DMs and in-channel notifications.

Config.Name: Discord Client ID
Config.Description: Optional. Discord OAuth client ID — required for user-linked DM notifications (Tier 3).
